tracks.rawText: 2:08Psicóloga Rebecav5.5Hard-hitting reggaeton at full throttle from the first bar: dembow kick on every beat, snare on the offbeats, booming 808 sub-bass with light distortion, metallic clap layers, and tight syncopated percussion, Bright synth brass stabs, percussive piano riffs, filtered synth leads, DJ tag vocal chops, wide delay throws, and crowded club-ready low-end2PublishRemix
